query:
-- Delete older pricing records, keep only the one with highest ID (latest) for each variant
DELETE FROM variant_pricing
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT MAX(id)
  FROM variant_pricing
  GROUP BY variantId
);
command:

-- Delete older pricing records, keep only the one with highest ID (latest) for each variant
DELETE FROM variant_pricing
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT MAX(id)
  FROM variant_pricing
  GROUP BY variantId
);
